description: Collision broad-phase kernel family in Genesis. Currently 12.85x MI300X/H100 ratio; the worst relative slowdown in the top-8 gap kernels.

edit_files.rationale: Main DSL implementation. ~396 lines. Contains qd.func helpers (func_find_intersect_midpoint, func_check_collision_valid, ...) and the @qd.kernel entry points that get JIT-compiled into the func_broad_phase_c*_kernel_* family.
Shared collision utilities (func_is_geom_aabbs_overlap, etc.). Allowed to edit if a broad_phase change requires touching a shared helper.

correctness_pytest_extra_args: -k "collision or broadphase or aabb or contact_island or not (test_convexify or test_mesh_repair or test_mesh_primitive_COM)"
